documentRequirements.name: Intake Form

applicability.requiredWhen: Required at the start of every patient workflow.

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Complete intake packet and confirm required demographics/workflow fields

documentRequirements.name: AVS PCP Template

applicability.requiredWhen: Required when after-visit or PCP communication is part of closure.

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Prepare AVS/PCP communication when discharge or closure details are ready

documentRequirements.name: Carepath PreAuth Audit - 20fx

applicability.requiredWhen: Use for 20 fraction IGSRT courses when payer authorization and audit evidence are required.

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Map billing pre-auth requirements before treating this as fully automated

documentRequirements.name: Carepath PreAuth Audit - 30fx

applicability.requiredWhen: Use for 30 fraction IGSRT courses when payer authorization and audit evidence are required.

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Map 30fx billing pre-auth requirements before treating this as fully automated

documentRequirements.name: CTP / SIM IGSRT Order
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Complete simulation order and route for Rad Onc signature

documentRequirements.name: IGSRT Prescription
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Verify prescription parameters and route for signature

documentRequirements.name: IGSRT Fraction Log
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Maintain treatment entries and reconcile approvals

documentRequirements.name: IGSRT Isodose Curve Support

applicability.requiredWhen: When isodose support is needed for treatment planning.

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Confirm isodose support requirements and mapping status

documentRequirements.name: Arthritis Hand Joint Mapping
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Capture joint scores and field design decision

documentRequirements.name: Arthritis Foot Joint Mapping
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Capture joint scores and field design decision

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Complete hand simulation order and route for Rad Onc signature

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Complete knee simulation order and route for Rad Onc signature

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Verify hand prescription parameters and route for signature

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Verify knee prescription parameters and route for signature

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Maintain hand treatment entries and reconcile approvals

documentRequirements.name: Arthritis Foot Fraction Log
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Maintain foot treatment entries and reconcile approvals

documentRequirements.name: Arthritis Knee Fraction Log
documentRequirements.requiredAction: Maintain knee treatment entries and reconcile approvals

documentRequirements.requiredAction: Capture US mapping and route for provider planning review

workflowDefinitions.name: Universal Patient Workflow
workflowDefinitions.description: Core intake and closure documents that can apply across evolving diagnosis workflows.

workflowDefinitions.name: Skin Cancer IGSRT Workflow
workflowDefinitions.description: Skin cancer IGSRT tracking for simulation, prescription, fraction log, isodose, and pre-auth evidence.

workflowDefinitions.name: Arthritis Workflow
workflowDefinitions.description: Arthritis tracking by body region while template details continue to be mapped.

workflowDefinitions.name: Dupuytren's Workflow
workflowDefinitions.description: Dupuytren's tracking with simulation, prescription, fraction log, and mapping still evolving.
